autor: if I kept reaching out. My accident really taught me just one thing: the only way to go on is to go on. To say 'I can do this' even when you know you can't.
explicacao: Citação de if I kept reaching out. My accident really taught me just one thing: the only way to go on is to go on. To say 'I can do this' even when you know you can't. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If I kept saying it” articula reflexao, stephen-king, duma-key em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como duma-key.
